cot_prefix: Okay, let's find the best title for this passage. The passage is about the London Olympics and their efforts to be environmentally friendly. The first paragraph mentions that London could win a gold medal for hosting the "greenest" Games ever. The rest of the article talks about various green initiatives: cleaning up polluted areas, using recycled materials in construction, green building techniques, waste management, public transport to reduce carbon emissions, and even the anti-doping efforts contributing to the greenness.
